title: Riot Platforms Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results and Strategic Highlights
text: Riot Platforms reported Q3 2025 net income of $104.5 million with Bitcoin mining revenue of $160.8 million for the quarter, compared to $67.5 million for the same period in 2024. Engineering revenue of $19.1 million for Q3 2025 compared to $12.6 million for the same period in 2024. As of end-September 2025, Riot's deployed hash rate was 36.5 EH/s, up roughly 29% from 28.2 EH/s a year earlier. Average operating hash rate in September 2025 was 32.2 EH/s, up from 19.5 EH/s in September 2024, a 65% increase. Riot held 19,287 bitcoin (of which 3,300 held as collateral), equating to approximately $2.2 billion based on market price of $114,068 per bitcoin on September 30, 2025. Riot holds nearly 20,000 BTC, securing the second-largest bitcoin treasury among public miners. Riot produced 1,406 bitcoin in the quarter, up from 1,104 mined in the same period last year.
